Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Jul-15-2008 Continued To Jul-30-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-24-2008 Continued To Jul-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-07-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Have Donative Transfer Under Will Declared Invalid
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lisa Carvalho for John Matzber (Respondent); Paul Kelly for Howard Cohen (Petitioner).

Mr. Kelly reported that the matter had settled through mediation. Ms. Carvalho concurred and stated that they would be seeking an approval of the settlement agreement. The court ordered the matter off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-17-2008 Continued To Apr-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Have Donative Transfer Under Will Declared Invalid
Off Calendar Feb-26-2008 Continued To Mar-25-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Respondent'S Demurrer To Petition Re Will Contest
Off Calendar Dec-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
There being no appearance and no opposition being filed, the Court ruled as follows: The Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. The proposed order was modified and signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Patricia Abalos CSR#13128. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: S Obi.

Petition To Have Donative Transfer Under Will Declared Invalid
Off Calendar Nov-20-2007 Continued To Feb-26-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lisa Carvalho for Respondent. John St. John for Howard Cohen (Petitioner).

The parties agreed to Pro Bono Mediation, (order for the same signed in open court). Mediation is to be completed by February 22, 2008. Further status is set for February 26, 2008. If the matter has not settled, a trial date will be set at the next hearing.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiffs: R. Guitron and R. Leong.

Petition To Have Donative Transfer Under Will Declared Invalid
Off Calendar Oct-02-2007 Continued To Nov-20-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-18-2007 Granted Per Written Order
